profile.description: Primary project profile such as python-package, python-native-wasm, cpp-library, csharp-app, javascript-web-app, python-js-app, or zephyr-firmware.

artifact_policy.description: Whether dist/ is transient packaging output or committed grouped runtime artifacts.

artifacts.description: Relative path to artifact governance catalog. Defaults to docs/governance/artifacts.toml.

vendors.description: Relative path to vendored-code governance catalog. Defaults to docs/governance/vendors.toml.

release.description: Relative path to release-channel governance catalog. Defaults to docs/governance/release.toml.

standard_docs.description: Canonical standard design-doc paths by language or profile family.

javascript.description: Canonical JavaScript standard design doc path. Defaults accept docs/design/javascript-standard.html or docs/design/standards/javascript.html.

roots.description: Configured active plan roots. Defaults to docs/plans.

pr_hygiene.description: Opt-in public GitHub pull-request hygiene policy.

enabled.description: Whether wn-dev-std check validates the public PR hygiene workflow.

workflow.description: Relative path to the GitHub PR hygiene workflow. Defaults to .github/workflows/pr-hygiene.yml.

pull_request_template.description: Relative path to the PR template. Defaults to .github/pull_request_template.md.

require_pull_request_template.description: Whether the local check requires a PR template with Linked issue guidance.
